name: Kraft Editorial
description: Light kraft-paper editorial Editorial video theme with warm paper surfaces, deep brown serif typography, aged stamp-brown accent, square panels, quiet hairlines, and documentary pacing.
descriptionZh: 暖米牛皮纸底、深棕衬线、旧印章棕强调、0 圆角、细密发丝线和安静印刷节奏，适合怀旧、人文、阅读、历史、文学和纪录片式 Editorial 视频。
